query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `app_config` (
  `key` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `value` text NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`key`)
);

  `key` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `value` text NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`key`)
);
